requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Electrical Safety — IEC 62109 Baseline, UL 1741 Expectations, and NEMA Installation Fit
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器电气安全——IEC 62109基准、UL 1741期望及NEMA安装适配
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器電氣安全——IEC 62109基準、UL 1741期望及NEMA安裝適配

summary.en: For FSM PV projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 remain useful electrical-safety references. Because FSM operates in a US-aligned 120/240 V 60 Hz environment, project owners and state utilities may additionally require UL 1741 inverter evidence, NEMA-compatible installation details, and field documentation for wiring, grounding, disconnecting, surge protection, and enclosures. Tropical coastal deployments should also verify salt, humidity, and typhoon-exposure suitability.
summary.zh: FSM光伏项目中，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2依然是有用的电气安全基准。但由于FSM是120/240 V 60 Hz的美国沿袭环境，项目业主和州公用事业可能还要求UL 1741逆变器证据、NEMA兼容安装细节，以及现场接线、接地、断路、浪涌保护和外壳适配文件。热带沿海项目还应核实耐盐、耐湿和台风暴露适配。
summary.zht: FSM光伏項目中，IEC 62109-1及IEC 62109-2依然是有用之電氣安全基準。但由於FSM為120/240 V 60 Hz美國延續環境，項目業主與州公共事業可能還要求UL 1741逆變器證據、NEMA相容安裝細節，以及現場接線、接地、斷路、浪湧保護與外殼適配文件。熱帶沿海項目還應核實耐鹽、耐濕和颶風暴露適配。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
UL 1741 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources
NEMA-style installation ecosystem — enclosure, wiring, disconnect, and field-installation compatibility as specified by the project reviewer

summary.en: China PV inverter safety and construction files rely on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, manufacturer declarations, and CNAS test reports. These documents support Chinese-market readiness but are not automatic evidence for FSM state-utility acceptance under a US-aligned 60 Hz model.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全和制造文件依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、制造商声明和CNAS测试报告。这些文件支持中国市场就绪性，但在美国体系60 Hz模型下不构成FSM州级验收的自动证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全和製造文件依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、製造商聲明與CNAS測試報告。這些文件支持中國市場就緒性，但在美國體系60 Hz模型下不構成FSM州級驗收的自動證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC/CGC voluntary certification schemes and CNAS laboratory reports for China domestic PV inverter products

gap.en: Exporters should supplement Chinese files with a FSM project package. At minimum, confirm IEC 62109-1/-2 model-family coverage, 60 Hz nameplate and firmware configuration, NEMA-compatible wiring and enclosure details, grounding and disconnect instructions, surge coordination, and coastal environmental ratings. If the state utility or project reviewer requires UL 1741, Chinese GB/T evidence cannot substitute.
gap.zh: 出口商应补充FSM项目文件。至少应确认IEC 62109-1/-2型号族覆盖、60 Hz铭牌和固件配置、NEMA兼容接线与外壳细节、接地和断路说明、浪涌配合以及沿海环境等级。若州公用事业或审查方要求UL 1741，中国GB/T证据不能替代。
gap.zht: 出口商應補充FSM項目文件。至少應確認IEC 62109-1/-2型號族覆蓋、60 Hz銘牌與韌體配置、NEMA相容接線與外殼細節、接地和斷路說明、浪湧配合及沿海環境等級。若州公共事業或審查方要求UL 1741，中國GB/T證據不能替代。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory through state utility, inspector, owner, insurer, or procurement requirements; UL 1741 is assessed per FSM project if requested
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic evidence remains supportive and is not accepted as complete FSM acceptance in itself

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 as the baseline safety file, then confirm whether UL 1741 and NEMA-style installation evidence is required for the specific FSM project and state utility. Chinese GB/T 37408/NB/T 32004 evidence should be supporting only unless explicitly accepted by the project approval route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 以IEC 62109-1/-2作为基准安全文件，再确认目标FSM项目是否由州公用事业要求UL 1741和NEMA式安装证据。除非项目批准流程明确接受，否则中国GB/T 37408/NB/T 32004证据仅作支持资料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 以IEC 62109-1/-2作為基準安全文件，再確認目標FSM項目是否由州公共事業要求UL 1741和NEMA式安裝證據。除非項目批准流程明確接受，否則中國GB/T 37408/NB/T 32004證據僅作支援資料。
